messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'unwatchUser', 'unwatchUsers', 'watchUser', and 'watchUsers'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [unwatchUser, unwatchUsers, user, watchUser, watchUsers]

messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

messages.message: The ref value 'subscribedConversations.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'subscribedConversations.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.

The ref value 'subscriptionStates.current' will likely have changed by the time this effect cleanup function runs. If this ref points to a node rendered by React, copy 'subscriptionStates.current' to a variable inside the effect, and use that variable in the cleanup function.
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'isConnected'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isConnected]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'onMessageReceived'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [conversationId, subscribeToConversation, unsubscribeFromConversation, onEchoReceived, isConnected, onMessageReceived]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchMessages'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [conversationId, fetchMessages]
